ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Downtime Notice
ham.body:
Dear Team,

This is a reminder that our corporate VPN service will undergo routine maintenance on **Tuesday, 10 May 2026, from 02:00 AM to 04:30 AM (UTC)**. During this window, all VPN connections will be unavailable. Please plan your work accordingly.

**What to Expect**
- All VPN endpoints will be offline.
- Public‑facing services that rely on VPN tunnels will be temporarily inaccessible.
- The maintenance will not affect local office network connectivity.

**What You Need to Do**
- Save any work that requires VPN access before the scheduled window.
- If you rely on VPN for remote access, please use the alternative secure portal (details below) until the service is restored.
- For any critical business processes that require VPN, contact IT support to arrange a temporary workaround.

**Alternative Access**
If you need to connect while the VPN is down, you can use the secure web portal at <URL>. This portal provides the same level of encryption and allows you to access internal resources via a browser.

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your cooperation. If you have questions or require assistance, please reply to this email or call the IT help desk at +1‑800‑555‑0199.

Thank you,

IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Package Delivery Fee Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Our records indicate that a shipment sent via FedEx on **09 May 2026** was not delivered to the intended recipient. As a result, a **$125.00 delivery fee** has accrued and remains unpaid. Failure to settle this fee within **48 hours** may result in additional penalties and may affect your future shipping privileges.

Please verify your account details and process the payment immediately to avoid further complications:

1. Log in to your FedEx account at <URL>.
2. Click on the “Pending Fees” section.
3. Select the shipment ID **FX-20260509-XYZ** and confirm payment.

If you believe this fee is incorrect or if you have already paid, please contact our customer support team at <URL> or call 1‑800‑FEDEX‑01. Our representatives are available 24/7 to resolve any discrepancies.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

FedEx Billing Department
